reason: Added require_capability('moodle/site:sendmessage', $context) before processing to enforce permission.
Used optional_param with appropriate PARAM_EMAIL and PARAM_TEXT to validate input parameters.
Direct output at this controller endpoint is acceptable; uses $OUTPUT methods which is Moodle standard.
Wrapped cache get/set methods in try-catch to handle errors gracefully with debugging.
Removed string addition from code; should be defined in language pack instead.
